subject: WS1.4 Solar watch-points addressed; still green
body: Fiery WS1.4 update: addressed Solar read-only prep watch-points that were actionable pre-review. Added explicit object-form context/frame scope, clarified the minimal pinned Oak Threads fixture comment, and added compact/frame invalid-output boundary assertions alongside expand. Re-ran focused graph-core gates: test now 4 files / 40 tests passed; type-check passed; lint passed; build passed. Holding for type/assumptions/test reviewer outputs before any commit-window move.
